name: Kinect depth (colormapped)
description: Subscribes to the depth channel of a Kinect 360, colormaps it (turbo), and publishes the result as a derived video stream that shows up as a dashboard tile.
use_case: Visualise depth alongside the regular RGB feed. Tune `near_mm`/`far_mm` on the depth_colormap node to bring out the distances you care about.
